calibration_use.sentence_level_style: Role-weighted 42-paper local corpus; open-access additions do not automatically establish personal sentence authorship.
calibration_use.public_outputs: Bibliographic metadata, aggregate counts, independently worded derived rules, tests, templates, metrics, checksums, and paraphrased cards only.

open_access_inclusion_rule: A nonduplicate journal article entered the 31-paper expansion only after an actual PDF or complete publisher HTML was verified for full-text reading.
limitations: The verified working corpus is not proof that every publication has been discovered or lawfully acquired in full text.
Coauthorship and open access do not establish personal sentence-level authorship.
Seven workspace note-directory years differ from note metadata because online-first and issue-year conventions were not normalized; DOI/title matching remains unique.
One expected record lacks DOI metadata and is matched by exact normalized title.
Source PDFs, extracted text, figures, evidence bundles, and per-paper deep-reading notes are excluded from the public skill.
